name_cn:
Chanel 2020 Shopping Bag 🛍️
Size: 37*26*14cm
Chanel Small Flap Bag, cool and practical, I love it🖤
Truly the most practical shopping bag I've ever seen!!️
Chanel Black Silver Calfskin Tote, Airport Bag, Zippered Shopping Bag
It has so many pockets inside and out...
iPad, books, phone, whatever you want to fit
Super cool on ☮️, I'm obsessed
Style 8329
